category_sources: Official GitHub README says FracturedJson is a family of utilities that format JSON data for human readability while staying compact.
source_facts.description says JSON formatter producing readable compact output.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README heading use FracturedJson.
source_facts.name provides the package name fracturedjson.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents the formatter behavior and examples.
Official GitHub repository exposes a Wiki tab.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/j-brooke/FracturedJson; per instruction, not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes formatting JSON into readable compact layouts.
